home.title: Smart CV Builder
home.subtitle: Create your professional resume with AI
home.featureAiDesc: Our AI collects your experience through a friendly conversation and suggests relevant skills.
home.featureGlobalDesc: Generate a Lebenslauf for the German market or an international CV in English.
home.featurePdfDesc: Download your resume as a professional PDF ready to send to employers.
home.ctaSubtitle: Let our AI guide you through the process — it only takes a few minutes.

chat.title: Resume Assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your resume assistant. Let's build your professional resume together. Tell me about your most recent work experience — what was the company and your position?
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while generating your resume. Please try again.
chat.errorNetwork: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.

dashboard.title: My Resumes
dashboard.noResumes: You haven't created any resumes yet.
